resultRaw.sql:
SELECT s.current_semester AS semester, COUNT(s.id) AS student_count
FROM public.students AS s
GROUP BY s.current_semester
ORDER BY semester ASC;

issues: X encoding uses type "ordinal" while semester is an integer – consider using "quantitative" (or keep ordinal but ensure numeric sorting) so axis ticks/order behave as numeric values.
Tooltip/axis titles are cosmetic: tooltip title uses "Students" instead of the field alias "student_count" (not a functional problem).

result.sql:
SELECT s.current_semester AS semester, COUNT(s.id) AS student_count
FROM public.students AS s
GROUP BY s.current_semester
ORDER BY semester ASC;

issues: X encoding uses type "ordinal" while semester is an integer – consider using "quantitative" (or keep ordinal but ensure numeric sorting) so axis ticks/order behave as numeric values.
Tooltip/axis titles are cosmetic: tooltip title uses "Students" instead of the field alias "student_count" (not a functional problem).
